series_metadata.series_title: School Bus Driver Medical Examination File
series_metadata.series_description: This report (T-8 form) contains the results of a medical examination by a physician, including such categories as loss of limb, blood pressure, drug use, tuberculosis, vision, hearing, heart, emotional stability, etc. Also included are addresses for the driver.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Data is entered into department computer system, and ; Paper: ten years
